comment.body:
For anyone who is new, the limitations of Substack leads to a lot of confusion. My 2 cents on how to approach using Alma's Substack is below.... pro tip is to BOOKMARK the links in your browser:

** Review each Weekly Post every Monday (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/market-analysis?utm_source=substack&utm_medium=menu)
** Review each Daily Post at beginning of the day (same link as above)

** Have two windows open for Chats everyday:
---- New Daily Chat set up each day 
---- Trading Signals Chat (Alma provides trading signals occasionally; set up on February 3 soon after Alma opened up the Substack; link is https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/5ec8d5aa-9fac-4e6d-aef1-3f6a28632ae4)

** Educate yourselves with these chats and posts by reading through them, maybe even more than once:
---- Ongoing Q&A Chat (set up on February 26; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/398075ab-2aac-41d1-bf37-8fda43ccf9aa) 
---- Options Depth Heat Map Overview (set up on February 5; https://substack.com/chat/2679129/post/2aab643b-d095-4c00-8b42-4f35379fb002)
---- Educational Posts (https://stochvoltrader.substack.com/s/educational-posts) 

Every so often I will copy and re-paste this post into chats when new folks jump in. Hope this helps!!!

comment.body:
GM, Alma, would you like to tell us the answer about yesterday's question? or confirm if Leonida's answer is correct or not?
1) whats the purpose of the 0DTE call?
2) what happens to its delta during the day?

Answer from Leonida: 
1)Hedging the negative extra synthetic delta exp.
2) call delta increased todaySo their hedging has been successful !?they BOUGHT CALL otm because of positive vanna above 5565?! (Not sure at all)

My answer
1) Same as Leonida, heding the negative extra synthetic delta exposure. I'm not sure it's OTM call or ITM call.
2) I think if price stabilized, and it's ITM call they bought (found two big 0dte itm call on my brokage, so I assume it's JPM's call), it's delta will slightly decrease as time decay. and I think by opening the calls, it make MM increased negative delta exp, so MM will buy back and support the price.
comment.raw_body:

2) call delta increased todaySo their hedging has been successful !?they BOUGHT CALL otm because of positive vanna above 5565?! (Not sure at all)
